work.name: Cloudforge Technologies
highlights: Architected and shipped a real-time analytics dashboard processing 2M+ events/day using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, reducing client reporting latency from 4 hours to under 30 seconds
Led migration from monolithic Express app to microservices architecture, improving deployment frequency from monthly to daily with zero-downtime releases
Designed and implemented a role-based access control system serving 15K+ users across 200 tenant organizations with row-level security in PostgreSQL
Mentored 4 junior engineers through structured code reviews and pair programming, resulting in 2 promotions within 18 months
Built CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, Docker, and AWS ECS that cut build times by 60% and eliminated manual deployment steps
Introduced OpenTelemetry-based observability stack (Grafana, Loki, Tempo) that reduced mean time to resolution from 3 hours to 25 minutes

work.name: Nexus Digital Solutions
highlights: Developed a customer-facing portal with React and TypeScript serving 50K monthly active users, achieving 99.7% uptime over 2 years
Built RESTful API layer with Express and Prisma ORM, implementing pagination, filtering, and full-text search across 30+ endpoints
Created automated data pipeline ingesting CSV/XML feeds from 12 partner integrations, processing 500K records daily with error recovery and audit logging
Reduced page load times by 45% through code splitting, lazy loading, and CDN optimization using Webpack and CloudFront
Collaborated with UX team to redesign the onboarding flow, increasing trial-to-paid conversion by 22% over 3 months

work.name: BrightPath Consulting
highlights: Built internal tools for project tracking and time reporting using React and Firebase, adopted by 80+ consultants across 3 offices
Developed responsive landing pages and marketing sites for 15+ client engagements using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress
Wrote Python scripts to automate monthly reporting workflows, saving the operations team approximately 20 hours per month
Participated in Agile ceremonies and contributed to sprint planning, daily standups, and retrospectives across 4 concurrent projects

projects.name: OpenBoard — Real-time Kanban App
highlights: Built a collaborative Kanban board with WebSocket-based real-time sync, supporting 50+ concurrent users per board
Implemented drag-and-drop with optimistic UI updates and conflict resolution for simultaneous edits
Tech stack: React, Socket.io, Express, PostgreSQL, deployed on Railway

projects.name: PulseCheck — Team Health Survey Tool
highlights: Designed and shipped anonymous team health surveys with trend visualization and manager dashboards
Built with Next.js, Prisma, and Chart.js — used internally at Nexus Digital for 6 quarterly cycles

volunteer.summary: Teach introductory web development workshops for career changers
highlights: Led 12 workshops reaching 200+ students
Developed curriculum for HTML/CSS/JS fundamentals

awards.title: Cloudforge Innovator Award
awards.summary: Recognized for the analytics dashboard project that became the company's flagship product demo

references.name: Jordan Chen, Engineering Manager at Cloudforge Technologies
references.reference: Alex is one of the most versatile engineers I've worked with. They can go from designing a system architecture whiteboard session to shipping production code in the same afternoon.
